articles.title: 'Told him his son was in Jaipur': Man dies in ICU unaware Delhi hotel fire killed 8 family members
articles.description: A 76-year-old man, Radheshyam Aggarwal, has passed away after losing eight relatives in a devastating Hauz Rani fire. His family had stayed at the B&B to be near him in the hospital, unaware of the tragedy. He died without knowing his wife, son, daughter-in-law, and granddaughters perished.
articles.full_text: Khushi Bhuta is a reporter based in New Delhi. She has prior reporting experience in her hometown Mumbai along with Chennai and Pune. She focuses closely on urban ground realities, particularly issues around crime and public safety. Her work revolves around lived experiences and the everyday impact of city systems. Read More

articles.title: Huge blow to India! Hardik Pandya to miss Afghanistan ODIs due to leg sprain
articles.description: Hardik Pandya will miss the upcoming ODI series against Afghanistan due to a mild leg sprain sustained during training. The all-rounder, who was at peak fitness, will remain in Bengaluru for at least two weeks for recovery under the guidance of medical staff. This setback prevents him from joining the squad as planned.
articles.full_text: Pratyush Raj is a cricket journalist with TOI Sports, specializing in all things cricket, both on and off the field. He began his career with the Business Standard before following his passion as a sports reporter for the Times of India in Chandigarh. Pratyush has also contributed to the sports coverage of India Today Group and his last stint was with The Indian Express. His love for sports was nurtured during his upbringing in flood-prone Saharsa, a district in North Bihar, where Cricket Samrat was his constant companion. Read More

articles.title: Wife clings to hubby’s car after spotting him with another woman in UP; dragged 100 metres
articles.description: A woman was dragged nearly 100 metres on the bonnet of a car in Bareilly after confronting her husband, whom she accused of infidelity. Bystanders intervened to rescue her after she sustained injuries and alleged assault and theft by the other woman. An FIR has been registered against both individuals.

articles.title: Watch: Explosion seen at US 5th Fleet headquarters in Bahrain as Iran retaliates
articles.description: Iran's IRGC claimed a drone attack on the US Navy's Fifth Fleet headquarters in Bahrain, alleging it was retaliation for recent US airstrikes on Iranian infrastructure. The IRGC stated the operation targeted the base in Manama after US strikes damaged civilian facilities in Jask, Sirik, and Qeshm, warning of stronger responses to further US military action.

articles.title: Watch: Trump's 'proportional response' to Iran after helicopter attack
articles.description: Following Iran's downing of a US Apache helicopter near the Strait of Hormuz, President Trump ordered retaliatory strikes on Iranian air defense systems. This escalation intensifies months of Middle East tensions, disrupting shipping and raising global energy prices. Iran vowed a "decisive response," casting doubt on ceasefire efforts amid ongoing regional hostilities.

articles.title: Reliance and Meta to develop AI-enabled data centre in Jamnagar
articles.description: Reliance Industries and Meta Platforms are joining forces to build a massive 168 MW AI-powered data centre in Jamnagar, Gujarat. This significant collaboration marks India's first built-to-suit facility for Meta, aiming to bolster global AI infrastructure. Reliance will manage the entire project, ensuring renewable energy and advanced cooling, positioning India as a key player in the AI revolution.

articles.description: "Tickets worth Rupees 52,36,000 were unsold. Why all the tickets were not sold-out? DDCA started online ticket sale quite late that too without proper advertisement," Khanna claimed in a media release.

articles.title: Centre clears three more foreign universities to establish campuses in India
articles.description: Three more foreign universities, including the University of Bristol, University of York, and University of New South Wales, have received approval to establish campuses in India. These institutions will set up operations in Mumbai and Bengaluru, offering programs in fields like finance, computer science, and business management, aligning with India's National Education Policy 2020.
articles.full_text: Three more foreign universities, including the University of Bristol, University of York, and University of New South Wales, have received approval to establish campuses in India. These institutions will set up operations in Mumbai and Bengaluru, offering programs in fields like finance, computer science, and business management, aligning with India's National Education Policy 2020.

articles.title: Kerala Plus One Result 2026: What to do if website crashes— alternative portals
articles.description: The Kerala Directorate of Higher Secondary Education is expected to release the Plus One (Class 11) results today, June 10, around 3 PM. Over four lakh students await their scorecards, which will be available online. Students are advised to have alternative websites and DigiLocker ready to access their results smoothly due to anticipated heavy traffic

articles.title: From working in a restaurant to leading HubSpot: Yamini Rangan's journey to the top
articles.description: Yamini Rangan, an Indian-origin tech executive, rose from engineering studies in India to become the CEO of HubSpot. With over two decades of experience across various tech roles, she now leads the global software company, focusing on innovation and customer experience. Her journey exemplifies the power of combining technical education with business acumen and leadership.

articles.title: Kerala DHSE Plus One result 2026 to be released today: Where and how to download Class 11 marksheets
articles.description: The Kerala Directorate of Higher Secondary Education is expected to release the Plus One (Class 11) results for 2026 today, June 10, around 3 PM. Students can check their scorecards on official websites, DigiLocker, or via SMS. The examinations were held from March 5 to March 27, with over four lakh students registered.

articles.title: Taylor Swift attends ‘Toy Story 5’ premiere; performs live - WATCH
articles.description: Taylor Swift made a surprise appearance at the 'Toy Story 5' premiere in Los Angeles, dazzling fans in a chic Erdem dress. The Grammy winner also contributed the original soundtrack song, 'I Knew It, I Knew You,' reportedly inspired by Jessie. Swift expressed her deep connection to the beloved franchise, which returns to theaters on June 19.

articles.description: In an exciting twist this summer, Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are rumored to be tying the knot during Swift's beloved July 4th 'Taymerica' bash. articles.title: Kevin reveals unknown detail from Nick-Priyanka's first date
articles.description: Kevin Jonas hilariously revealed he 'wingmanned hard' for brother Nick Jonas' first date with Priyanka Chopra in 2018, even getting sick from the effort. Nick praised his brother's dedication, recalling the memorable evening that led to their first French kiss and a lasting romance. The couple is celebrating their eighth anniversary of that first date.

articles.title: Veteran filmmaker Bharathiraja passes away at 84
articles.description: Renowned Tamil filmmaker Bharathiraja, celebrated for his realistic portrayal of rural life, has passed away at 84. His groundbreaking films like '16 Vayathinile' redefined Tamil cinema. Remembered by industry colleagues and fans, his immense legacy as a visionary storyteller and mentor will continue to inspire generations.
